about.title: Nordic relaxation for body and soul all year round…
about.paragraph1: We invite you to relax in Scandinavian-style duplex apartments near Rubikiai Lake in Anykščiai district. Here you will enjoy a private Jacuzzi, from which you can watch the local residents - fallow deer. You can admire and feed them, and they will reward you with unforgettable moments, soul therapy and peace...
about.paragraph2: For those seeking complete privacy - a luxurious Lake House for two in the embrace of nature, just 10 steps from the lake and forest…
about.paragraph3: Complement your stay with lake activities - peaceful boat or pedal boat rides, or perhaps memorable kayak adventures...
about.ezeroNamelisDesc: A charming, separate holiday cottage on the lakeshore – The perfect escape with stunning sunsets, starry nights and peaceful mornings...
about.dupleksoApartamentaiDesc: Two stylish apartments offering Scandinavian comfort and modern amenities in the company of deer…

ezeroNamelis.title: Ežero Namelis
ezeroNamelis.subtitle: Private and Romantic Lake House for Two
ezeroNamelis.tagline: A private and romantic cottage for two
ezeroNamelis.feature2: Luxurious jacuzzi on the terrace with lake views
ezeroNamelis.feature4: The apartment has everything two people might need
ezeroNamelis.feature6: During the warm season you can also enjoy outdoor facilities - barbecue and fire pit

description.p1: Private and Romantic Lake House for two - just 10 steps from the lake and forest.
description.p3: Luxurious jacuzzi on the terrace with a view of Rubikiai Lake and unforgettable sunsets...
description.p5: In the apartment you will find everything you might need: a fully equipped kitchen, lounge area, bathroom, bedroom with a comfortable large double bed, wifi, TV, Kamado Picnic grill on the terrace, towels, bed linen, bathrobes, etc....
description.p6: Heated floors for your comfort, heat pump to ensure warm evenings, air conditioning to cool down during hot summer...
description.p7: During the warm season you can also enjoy the nearby large private beach. We offer kayak, pedal boat or boat rental, which you can use to explore and discover up to 16 Rubikiai Lake islands or accompany the most beautiful red sunsets.

dupleksas.title: Duplex Apartments
dupleksas.subtitle: Experience magical moments by the Rubikiai lake.

description.p1: Relax in luxurious duplex apartments in Anykščiai district by Rubikiai Lake surrounded by nature.
description.p2: The bright, classic Scandinavian-style duplex is located just 100m from Rubikiai Lake.
description.p3: The duplex is unique in that it borders a 2ha fallow deer territory (only a transparent fence separates you). The duplex consists of two 40m2 apartments, with separate entrances, separate terraces and private whirlpool SPA baths (Jacuzzi).
description.p4: One duplex apartment can accommodate up to 4 people, and when booking the entire duplex (both apartments) up to 8 people. Here you will find everything you might need for relaxation: a fully equipped kitchen, lounge area, bathroom, bedroom (2 single and 1 double beds), wifi, TV, towels, bed linen, bathrobes, etc.
description.p5: Heated floors for your comfort, heat pump to ensure warm evenings, a stove for romantic coziness, air conditioning to cool down during hot summer...
description.p6: During the warm season, you can also enjoy the nearby large private beach. We offer kayak, pedal boat or boat rental, which you can use to explore and discover up to 16 Rubikiai Lake islands or accompany the most beautiful red sunsets.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.rule1: Apartments are rented for quiet relaxation only.
reservations.rule2: Minors are only accepted from the age of 16 or by prior arrangement
reservations.rule3: For the safety of the reindeer - pets are not allowed
reservations.rule4: By making a reservation, you confirm that you have read our house rules and reservation terms.
reservations.rule5: Check-in time is from 16:00. Check-out time is until 12:00 in Ezero Namelis and 11:00 in Duplex Apartments.
reservations.viewAllRules: You can view all rules on our
reservations.payment1: When reserving, you pay a booking deposit equal to one night's stay. The remaining amount is paid upon arrival.
reservations.payment2: If an error occurs in the booking system that makes the service unavailable or results in an unreasonably low price, we will inform you as soon as possible and the reservation will be canceled, rescheduled, or your deposit will be refunded.
reservations.payment3: You may change the reservation date once free of charge no later than 7 days before arrival. The reservation deposit is non-refundable. Multiple date changes are charged at the amount of 20€.

form.noResults: No results. Select dates or change amount of guests and click "Search".

form.calendarTip: Tip: Navigate dates using "Previous" and "Next" buttons. Days marked with ✓ are available to book.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about your stay at our retreat.
faq.q1: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.a1: Check-in time is from 16:00 PM. Check-out time is until 12:00 in Ezero Namelis and 11:00 in Duplex Apartments.
faq.a2: For the safety and tranquility of the fallow deer, pets are not allowed. If you arrive with a pet, you will be asked to leave, and the payment will not be refunded.
faq.q3: Can I feed the fallow deer?
faq.a3: You can only feed the fallow deer with fruits and vegetables, which you can either bring yourself or purchase in a basket for a symbolic price upon arrival.
faq.q4: Can I cancel my reservation and get a refund?
faq.a4: You may change the reservation date once free of charge no later than 7 days before arrival. The reservation deposit is non-refundable. Multiple date changes are charged at the amount of 20€.
faq.q5: Is there Wi-Fi available in the apartments?
faq.a5: Yes, all our apartments offer free and stable Wi-Fi connectivity for all our guests.
faq.a6: Yes, they are valid for 1 year from purchase. You can buy them at www.rubikiailux.lt in coupons section or info@rubikiailux.lt
faq.q7: Is the jacuzzi at an additional charge?
faq.a7: Yes. Once the jacuzzi service is reserved, you can enjoy it from 18:00 to 24:00. All jacuzzis are electric, with lounge seats and massage jets...
